meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't debug code (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't debug code. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Template to Fix Debugging Issues
content.seo_description: Master complex debugging with the Antigravity project template and Claude Code. A high-efficiency guide for freelancers to ship faster and reduce errors.
content.answer_block: Stop wrestling with cryptic stack traces. By implementing the Antigravity project template, you standardize your codebase architecture, enabling automated diagnostic loops. Pair this with Claude Code to execute precision-targeted refactoring, turning hours of manual debugging into minutes of AI-assisted resolution, ensuring your client projects remain on schedule and error-free.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, your client is waiting, and your terminal is bleeding red errors. We have all been there: staring at a spaghetti-code mess, unable to trace where the state management failed or why the API integration is silently dropping requests. The frustration isn't just about the bug—it's about the lost billable hours.

True velocity as a freelancer isn't about typing faster; it's about building smarter. By adopting the Antigravity project template, you move from manual 'hunt-and-peck' debugging to a structured, repeatable engineering workflow. This case study shows you how to leverage AI-native architecture to eliminate the mystery behind your code and ship production-ready features with surgical precision.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Framework
steps.description: Standardize your project structure to ensure all subsequent AI debugging agents can parse your directory architecture without confusion.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity standard structure, prioritizing modular service separation and clear dependency injection.

steps.title: Isolate the Failure Point
steps.description: Use Claude Code to perform a top-down scan to identify if the bug is a syntax issue, a logic flow error, or a dependency mismatch.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current execution flow and identify the specific module causing the current runtime exception.

steps.title: Inject Diagnostic Logging
steps.description: Automatically wrap problematic functions with ephemeral logging to capture real-time state changes during execution.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Inject observability hooks into the identified problematic service functions to capture variable states before the crash.

steps.title: Execute Automated Refactoring
steps.description: Apply the fix based on the diagnostic data while maintaining the project's strict type-safety standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the logic in the failing module to handle edge cases identified in the diagnostic logs, ensuring type safety.

steps.title: Validate with Regression Testing
steps.description: Ensure the fix didn't introduce new issues by running a comprehensive suite of automated tests against the new changes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run a regression test suite against the entire codebase to ensure no breaking changes were introduced during the fix.

pro_tips: Always define your 'Error Threshold' in a manifest file so the AI knows exactly when to stop and report instead of attempting endless loops.
Use Claude Code's 'memory' feature to store the specific quirks of your client's legacy API, drastically speeding up future debugging sessions.
Map your project's 'happy path' in a JSON file; AI agents debug significantly better when they know what 'correct' looks like.
Never fix bugs in production directly; use the Antigravity template to spin up a 'shadow environment' that mirrors your prod database.
Use semantic versioning for your AI prompts to track which engineering strategies yield the highest success rates for specific bug types.
resources: Best Practices for AI Engineering: https://ai-builder.community/patterns
content.next_steps: After completing this, integrate your Antigravity project into your CI/CD pipeline to automate these debugging steps every time you push to your main branch.
content.conversion_block: Stop manually debugging and start building scalable, high-impact SaaS solutions that keep your clients coming back. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
